chunks.en: Today I'll talk about how I get to work.
chunks.ja: 今日は職場までの行き方について話します。

chunks.en: I usually leave home at eight in the morning.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい朝8時に家を出ます。

chunks.en: I walk to the station for ten minutes.
chunks.ja: 私は駅まで10分歩きます。

chunks.en: Then I take the train to my office.
chunks.ja: それから電車に乗って会社まで行きます。

chunks.en: On the way I listen to music on my phone.
chunks.ja: 移動中はスマホで音楽を聴きます。

chunks.en: Sometimes I read the news on my phone too.
chunks.ja: ときどきスマホでニュースも読みます。

chunks.en: It takes about thirty minutes to get there.
chunks.ja: そこに着くまで約30分かかります。

chunks.en: The morning train is often very crowded.
chunks.ja: 朝の電車はよくとても混んでいます。

outline: Opening: how I get to work
Point 1: leave home, walk and train
Point 2: music and news on the way
Wrap-up: about thirty minutes, crowded train

modelTalk.text: I usually leave home at eight in the morning. I don't like to rush, so I get up early. First I walk to the station. It takes about five minutes. Then I take the train. The train is often crowded in the morning. Sometimes I can't find a seat. But that's okay for me. On the way I listen to music. I love pop songs a lot. Sometimes I look at my phone too. I read the news or check messages. The whole trip takes about thirty minutes. Then I walk a little more to work. I'm not tired when I arrive. It's a nice start to my day.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about how I get to work.
chunks.ja: 今日は、私がどうやって仕事に行くかについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually leave home at seven thirty in the morning.
chunks.ja: 私はいつも朝の7時半に家を出ます。

chunks.en: I take the train and then I walk a little.
chunks.ja: 私は電車に乗って、それから少し歩きます。

chunks.en: On the way I listen to music on my phone.
chunks.ja: 移動中は、スマホで音楽を聞きます。

chunks.en: It takes about thirty minutes from my home.
chunks.ja: 家から30分くらいかかります。

chunks.en: The train is often crowded in the morning.
chunks.ja: 電車は朝、よく混んでいます。

chunks.en: So that's how I get to work every day.
chunks.ja: というわけで、これが毎日私が仕事に行く方法です。

outline: Opening: how I get to work
Time I leave and my route
What I do on the way and how long it takes

modelTalk.text: I usually leave home at eight in the morning. I don't have a car, so I take the train. First, I walk to the station. It's about ten minutes from my house. Then I get on the train. It's usually full of people. On the way, I listen to music. Sometimes I look at my phone too. I read the news or check my messages. The train ride is short and easy. I get off and walk again. The whole trip takes about thirty minutes. In the morning, it's really crowded. But I don't mind. I like this quiet time before my day starts.
